title: Barbeque Nation Digital Technologies is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Barbeque Nation Digital Technologies is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Barbeque Nation Digital Technologies is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Chennai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Barbeque Nation Digital Technologies:
Barbeque Nation Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Barbeque Nation Digital Technologies!
